title: ParseErrors from form.rs have line:0 col:0 — useless location
description: Every ParseError constructed in form.rs has line: 0, col: 0. The ParseError struct has those fields but form.rs does not track position. Users see 'parse error at 0:0: unclosed {' — the 0:0 is actively misleading. Either propagate token positions through the form layer (tokens could carry location from the lexer) or drop line/col from ParseError and just use the message. A user debugging a script parse error cannot use location 0:0.
